license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfudjns6
title: Human Fallopian Tube and Ovary Dissociation for Single Cell RNA-Seq
author: Melissa Javellana

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare 10 mL of Pronase solution per sample in 50ml LoBind conical : %s %s Primary culture and immortalization of human fallopian tube secretory epithelial cells.. Nature protocols.
Prepare 10 mL of digestion buffer per sample in a 50 mL LoBind conical: %s %s
Rinse gross blood off samples with DMEM/10% FBS.
Place each sample into 10 mL of Pronase solution . Place in 37 °C orbital shaker at 200 rpm for 00:30:00 .

Using a 10 ml pipette, triturate tissue to remove loose epithelial fraction. Pass all of the pronase solution through 70 μm filter into new 50 ml LoBind conical and rinse filter with 10 mL DMEM/10%FBS. Recover solid fraction from original conical and/or off of filter. NOTE: You now have an epithelial fraction and a solid fraction . You will continue to process the epithelial fraction and solid fraction separately in the next steps. Both contain potentially unique cell types.
Place remaining solid fraction in digestion buffer . Place on 37 °C orbital shaker at 200 rpm for 00:30:00 to 00:45:00
Spin down epithelial fraction at 400 rcf for 00:04:00 . Aspirate and discard supernatant. Re-suspend in 3 mL DMEM/FBS and wait for solid tissue fraction to complete digestion.
Pass solid fraction solution through a 70 μm filter into conical containing epithelial fraction and rinse filter with 10 mL DMEM/FBS.
Spin down at 400 rcf for 00:04:00 . Aspirate and discard supernatant. Re-suspend in 1 mL PBS/0.05% BSA
Move solution to Eppendorf tube and add 12 µL 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA
Vortex the EasySep RBC depletion reagent bottle for 00:00:30 to re-suspend
Add 25 µL reagent and gentle vortex for 00:00:03 until solution appears homogeneous
Place on magnet and incubate 00:05:00
Leaving on magnet, pipet off clear solution
Re-suspend in pre-warmed 37 °C DMEM/10%FBS.
Note: Keep all solutions at 37 °C throughout protocol.
Fallopian tube isthmus: bivalve
Fallopian tube ampulla: bivalve
Fallopian tube fimbriae : leave whole
Ovary: mince 100 mg tissue into 1-2 mm pieces.
Assess viabilty with trypan blue if proceeding immediately to single cell library creation or method of choice if optimizing protocol.
